name: Bronze Sword
description: A simple blade forged in Crydee. Reliable for a new adventurer.
loreText: A sword used by frontier guards. It has seen skirmishes with bandits and slavers.

name: Leather Armor
description: Light armor that allows freedom of movement.
loreText: Made from cured hides in the western woods, it offers little protection against magic.

name: Healing Potion
description: A small vial of restorative liquid.
loreText: Brewed by apothecaries around Crydee, it restores vitality in a pinch.

name: Iron Dagger
description: A sharper blade favored by scouts and rogues.
loreText: Crafted by a Krondor smith, its edge holds longer than common iron.

name: Sturdy Shield
description: A reinforced wooden shield, good for defense.
loreText: Used by Crydee guards to hold the line against raiders.

name: Tattered Cloak
description: A worn cloak that guards against wind and cold.
loreText: Many refugees wear similar cloaks after fleeing the battle-scarred countryside.

name: Ritual Dust
description: A vial of powder used in arcane rituals.
loreText: Rumored to be harvested from the ruins where rifts appear.

name: Traveler Rations
description: Simple dried food to stave off hunger.
loreText: Carried by every caravan on the road to Crydee.

name: Old Ring
description: A ring inscribed with a forgotten name.
loreText: Found at the edge of the forest ruins, it hums faintly when rifts are near.

name: Tarnished Medallion
description: An ancient medallion marked with a strange symbol.
loreText: Sealed in the ruins for a time long forgotten; it resonates with the Rift.

name: Crydee Horse
description: A sturdy mount bred in Crydee, good for covering ground quickly.
loreText: Used by scouts and messengers to traverse the frontier swiftly.

name: Pack Mule
description: A reliable beast of burden, slow but able to carry supplies.
loreText: Merchants rely on pack mules to move goods between duchies.

name: Rift Crystal
description: A shard of concentrated Rift energy.
loreText: Rumoured to be a piece of the world before the Rift, it pulses with power.

name: Lesser Path Grimoire
description: A tome bound in shifting leather, containing lesser path secrets.
loreText: Crafted by a master of the Lesser Path, it offers insight into disciplined magic.

name: Trench Knife
description: A brutal close-quarters blade carried by warfront raiders.
loreText: Its guard is wrapped in old banner cloth from a road company that never reached Krondor.

name: Warden's Seal
description: A battered seal-ring worn by the road wardens guarding the approaches inland.
loreText: The seal bears a faded road mark pointing toward Krondor, a promise of safer lands farther east.

name: Krondor Dispatches
description: A sealed dispatch satchel recovered from the Culvert Breach cache.
loreText: The roadwarden reports inside detail broken routes, failed signal relays, and a desperate plan to reopen the Krondor road before the warfront collapses entirely.

name: Roadwarden Relay
description: A reclaimed signal relay shard that still carries a low war-hum beneath the Rift static.
loreText: Recovered from the heart of the Culvert Breach, the relay is proof that the war and the Rift are now fused into the same failing infrastructure.
